title: Kai Optimized
description: A simple cool optimized modpack for mc. By Misticalkai
body:
### KAI OPTIMIZED

Kai Optimized is a Modpack that the youtuber Misticalkai has made to give his audiance and the rest of the Minecraft community his mods that he uses!

(I do not own or maintain the mods inside of this modack, but i do keep the modpack updated as much as possible)

This modpack is based off of Fabulously Optimized, check them out [Here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized).)
